pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.5 to align with the Java 21 migration and latest framework features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target/release settings are not updated to match the installed JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to 1.18.34 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from Lombok dependency to rely on the managed version from Spring Boot parent.
Replace webjars-locator-core with webjars-locator-lite to align with Spring Boot 3.x recommendations.
pom.xml.why_exists: webjars-locator-core is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Boot versions; using it may cause runtime errors or missing resources.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processing conflicts between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to generate correct code when Lombok is present, leading to compilation errors or missing methods.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to the maven-compiler-plugin annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: The binding must be on the annotation processor path to function; otherwise, MapStruct generation fails.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin from source/target to release configuration for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 is deprecated and may cause warnings or incompatibilities; release is the standard for JDK 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the openrewrite-maven-plugin which was used for the initial Spring Boot 3 migration.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image to use Java 17 instead of Java 11 to align with the application's JDK upgrade.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 17/21 features and dependencies; running on a Java 11 JRE would result in runtime errors (e.g., NoSuchMethodError, UnsupportedClassVersionError) or missing module support.

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Remove unused import of WebSecurityCustomizer after migrating static resource configuration.
Move static resource paths from WebSecurityCustomizer ignoring to HttpSecurity permitAll to align with Spring Security 6 best practices.
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.before: private static final String[] PUBLIC = new String[]{"/error", "/login", "/logout", "/actuator/**"};
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.after: private static final String[] PUBLIC = new String[]{"/error", "/login", "/logout", "/actuator/**","/static/**", "/js/**", "/css/**", "/image/**", "/favicon.ico", "/webjars/**"};

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Remove WebSecurityCustomizer bean that was used to ignore static resources, as they are now handled via permitAll.
Change the JPA relationship annotation from OneToOne to ManyToOne to correctly model the database schema.
Add import for the OrderHeaderProjection interface used in the search logic.
Add imports for JPA EntityManager and PersistenceContext to enable manual persistence context management.
Add import for PageRequest to support batched pagination in the search method.
Inject EntityManager to allow clearing the persistence context between batches.
Mark the getOrders method as read-only transaction to optimize database access.
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.before: public Page<OrderHeaderDTO> getOrders(EntitySelector entitySelector, Pageable pageable) {
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.after:
@Transactional(readOnly = true)
	public Page<OrderHeaderDTO> getOrders(EntitySelector entitySelector, Pageable pageable) {

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Uncomment and activate the text search logic that was previously disabled due to performance concerns.
Uncomment and refactor the helper method to use batched fetching with persistence context clearing for performance.

src/main/resources/application-dev.prope.general_idea: Comment out the explicit JPA database platform property to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Comment out the explicit JPA database platform property to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Remove explicit JPA database platform property as it is auto-detected in newer Hibernate versions.
Disable Open Session In View pattern to prevent performance issues and runtime warnings in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/resources/templates/fragments/a.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf fragment replacement syntax to use the explicit tilde selector.
Extract hardcoded API URL for order confirmation into a Thymeleaf-resolved constant to support context path and improve maintainability.
Extract hardcoded API URL for order cancellation into a Thymeleaf-resolved constant to support context path and improve maintainability.
